title: Implement a multi-module CSV pipeline
prompt: This project has three stub modules under src/ (parse.mjs, aggregate.mjs, format.mjs) that currently throw 'not implemented', plus a test suite at test/pipeline.test.mjs that specifies their exact required behavior. Implement all three modules so the entire suite passes. Read the tests carefully to understand the contracts — in particular, CSV parsing must handle quoted fields that contain commas and escaped double-quotes ("" -> "). Do NOT modify any files under test/. The work is complete only when `node --test test/pipeline.test.mjs` exits successfully.
